title: ‘Project of national importance’: Supreme Court backs Wayanad tunnel project, refuses to cancel environment clearance
description: Appearing for the appellant, Wayanad Prakrithi Samrakshana Samithi, Senior Advocate Shyam Divan said the project area is prone to landslides, citing the 2024 incident that killed hundreds and caused widespread damage.
content: The Supreme Court Monday refused to interfere with the Kerala High Court order rejecting the challenge to the Environment Clearance (EC) to the twin-tunnel project through the Western Ghats linking W… [+3812 chars]
de: „Projekt von nationaler Bedeutung“: Oberster Gerichtshof unterstützt Wayanad-Tunnelprojekt, weigert sich, die Umweltfreigabe aufzuheben. Der leitende Anwalt Shyam Divan, der für den Berufungskläger Wayanad Prakrithi Samrakshana Samithi eintrat, sagte, das Projektgebiet sei anfällig für Erdrutsche und verwies auf den Vorfall im Jahr 2024, bei dem Hunderte Menschen ums Leben kamen und weitreichende Schäden angerichtet wurden.
en: ‘Project of national importance’: Supreme Court backs Wayanad tunnel project, refuses to cancel environment clearance. Appearing for the appellant, Wayanad Prakrithi Samrakshana Samithi, Senior Advocate Shyam Divan said the project area is prone to landslides, citing the 2024 incident that killed hundreds and caused widespread damage.
la: 'Proiectum momenti nationalis': Summi Court remittit consilium Wayanad cuniculum, ambitus alvi deiectio recusat. Apparens pro appellanti Wayanad Prakrithi Samrakshana Samithi, Senior Advocatus Shyam Divan dixit area project proclivior ad proruit, dicens 2024 incidentes centenas occidisse et damnum latissimum effecit.

title: These rock-climbing fish can shimmy up a 50-foot waterfall
description: New research from the Democratic Republic of Congo offers a behavioral and anatomical portrait of a species that can achieve surprising athletic feats.
content: Seventeen years ago, Auguste Chocha Manda, a researcher at the Université de Lubumbashi in the Democratic Republic of Congo, traveled to the Luvilombo waterfall in the south of the country where he s… [+4787 chars]
de: Diese Kletterfische können einen 50 Fuß hohen Wasserfall hinaufklettern. Neue Forschungsergebnisse aus der Demokratischen Republik Kongo bieten ein Verhaltens- und Anatomieporträt einer Spezies, die überraschende sportliche Leistungen vollbringen kann.
en: These rock-climbing fish can shimmy up a 50-foot waterfall. New research from the Democratic Republic of Congo offers a behavioral and anatomical portrait of a species that can achieve surprising athletic feats.
la: Hi pisces saxei ascendentes 50 pedis cataracta shimmy possunt. Nova investigatio e Reipublicae Democratica Congensis imaginem humanam et anatomicam praebet speciei quae mirabilia facinora athletica consequi potest.

de: Seltsame „Elefantenhaut“-Felsen offenbaren uraltes Leben im dunklen Ozean. en: Strange “elephant skin” rocks reveal ancient life in the dark ocean. A puzzling wrinkled rock formation in Morocco has led scientists to rethink where ancient microbes could live. la: Mira "pelle elephanti" saxa vitam antiquam in caliginoso oceano manifestant. Rugiens rugosa formatio petrae in Mauritania phisicis recogitandi induxit ubi antiquae microbes vivere potuerunt. title: Cruise companies to Alaska are avoiding a popular excursion to Tracy Arm after a massive landslide
description: For years, a popular part of many cruises in southeast Alaska has been sailing up Tracy Arm, a long, narrow fjord marked by steep mountains, glittering waterfalls and calving glaciers
content: JUNEAU, Alaska -- For years, a popular part of many cruises in southeast Alaska has been sailing up Tracy Arm, a long, narrow fjord marked by steep mountains, glittering waterfalls and calving glacie… [+4125 chars]
de: Kreuzfahrtunternehmen nach Alaska verzichten nach einem massiven Erdrutsch auf einen beliebten Ausflug nach Tracy Arm. Ein beliebter Teil vieler Kreuzfahrten im Südosten Alaskas ist seit Jahren die Fahrt den Tracy Arm hinauf, einen langen, schmalen Fjord, der von steilen Bergen, glitzernden Wasserfällen und kalbenden Gletschern geprägt ist
en: Cruise companies to Alaska are avoiding a popular excursion to Tracy Arm after a massive landslide. For years, a popular part of many cruises in southeast Alaska has been sailing up Tracy Arm, a long, narrow fjord marked by steep mountains, glittering waterfalls and calving glaciers
la: Societates in Alaska cruise popularem excursionem ad Tracy Brachium post ingens ruinam vitant. Annos, pars popularis plurium cruisium in Alasca meridiem orientalem navigavit Brachium, longum, angustum fjord montibus praeruptis, micantibus cataractarum et foetuum molibus.
